articles.title: A wild night in Foxborough shows Boston is ready to embrace magic of World Cup
articles.description:
The din of bagpipes, The Proclaimers, and decibel-defying chants rang across Foxborough on Saturday night.

The post A wild night in Foxborough shows Boston is ready to embrace magic of World Cup appeared first on Boston.com.
